name: Kilowott Design System
description: Component catalog. Machine-readable pointer for AI agents — each component lists its class, file, and the rule that governs it.

pages.role: spacing · grid · radii · motion · full token dump
buttons · forms · cards · tabs · badges · UI states
full case-study template · situation → decision → result

button.rule: One accent per view. Accent reserved for conversion-critical.

badge.rule: Dot shown by default for status; strip for taxonomy tags.

eyebrow.rule: ALL CAPS · 0.18em tracked · 24px rule prefix · max 4 words.

card.rule: Paper bg · 1px rule · r-3 · s-6 padding.

stat.rule: One number serif + one line + source line mono.

case-card.rule: 4/3 photo · gradient scrim · meta pills · case title with em accent.

input.rule: Label above (uppercase), focus = accent border + 3px ring @ 12%.

checkbox.rule: Paper tick on ink · 18px hit area.

switch.rule: Instant-apply only. Form submits use checkbox.

tabs-underline.rule: Long-list filtering · accent underline on active.

breadcrumb.rule: Deep pages only (3+ levels). Soft slash separator.

state-empty.rule: One italic accent word in headline · one primary action · never sad-face illustrations.

state-error.rule: Name the failure plainly · include a reference code · retry is always first action.

skeleton.rule: Shape matches loading content · 1.4s pulse · respects prefers-reduced-motion.

spinner.rule: Rule border + accent top arc. Use sparingly — skeletons are the default.

404.rule: Italic 0 is the accent moment. Plain and useful.

icon-set.css-override: .lucide { width: 24px; height: 24px; stroke-width: 1.5; stroke: currentColor; stroke-linecap: round; stroke-linejoin: round; fill: none; }
rules: Lucide first. If the icon exists in Lucide, use it — never hand-draw a one-off.
stroke-width: 1.5 and currentColor always. Never override to a hex.
Accent color is state-only — hover, active, alert. Resting icons inherit var(--fg).
Hit area min 36x36 on interactive icons. Icon button padding 6–8px around a 20–24px glyph.

kpi-tile.rule: Serif only on headline number; everything else sans or mono.

delta-chip.rule: Up = ink. Down = red. Flat = muted em-dash.

toolbar.rule: Search left · scope center · view toggles right-center · primary action far right.

spreadsheet.rule: Toolbar · formula bar · chips · grid · tabs. Sticky row-nums + col-headers + first data col.

sheet-tabs.rule: Top for application-style workbooks; bottom for document-style.

candlestick.rule: Up = ink, down = accent. Hover for OHLC tooltip.

tree-grid.rule: Chevron expand/collapse. Depth = indent only, no vertical rules.

waterfall.rule: Start/end ink-muted. Gains ink. Losses accent. Dashed connectors.

heatmap.rule: Red scale is the ONLY place red fills large areas — severity is the point.

forecast.rule: Actuals solid line. Divider = today. Scenario buttons morph line + KPIs.

dashboard-shell.rule: Paper sidebar, ink accent tick for active page, paper body, crumb topbar.

voice.positioning: Scale faster. Deliver better. Create impact.
